name: Healthy Spam Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet over medium-high heat, sauté SPAM until lightly browned.
Remove the SPAM from the skillet.
2. Add cabbage, zucchini, onion, carrot, garlic, basil, oregano, and red pepper flakes to the skillet.
Cook over low heat for 10 minutes or until the vegetables are crisp-tender.
3. Drain any juice from the tomatoes, then reserve it.
Add enough water to the tomato juice to make a total of 2 cups.
4. Combine the tomato mixture, vegetable mixture, SPAM, rice, and brown sugar in another bowl.
Cover and cook for 10 minutes.
5. In a large saucepan, boil the bell peppers in water for 5-7 minutes or until crisp-tender.
Drain the peppers.
6. Fill each pepper with the SPAM mixture.
